Title: Dead Star AI
Description: Bending AI reasoning before it arrives. A multimodal experience with Gemma 4.
URL: https://deadstarai.vercel.app/

# Dead Star AI

Dead Star AI is an advanced thinking engine powered by Gemma 4. It offers a transparent multimodal reasoning process, allowing users to inject custom neural links, observe the internal stream of thoughts before an answer is finalized, and collaborate with the reasoning loop.

Features:
- Streaming transparent reasoning nodes
- Real-time Web Search via Tavily
- Vision analysis
- Upstash Redis global rate limiting
- Secure execution in Vercel Edge Runtime
